name: Cloud Pouch
description:
This small bag is filled with a fine, silvery powder that feels silky to the touch.

Activate—Disperse (2 Actions) (manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You scatter the dust into the air around you, causing it to condense into a cloud in a 20-foot burst within 10 feet, as the Mist spell. You can Sustain the activation to make the cloud Fly 20 feet. The cloud lasts 1 minute, and you can Dismiss it.
